description_long: This object is a small, square wooden serving tray with a simple, rustic construction, featuring four thick, upright corner posts and slatted wooden base. The tray holds two pieces of sushi, one with a pinkish hue and the other with an orange and white striped appearance, likely representing tuna and salmon nigiri. The wood has a natural, unfinished look with visible grain and a matte surface, giving it an artisanal feel. The tray's sides are formed by thick wooden planks, joined at the corners with visible interlocking joints, and the rim is slightly raised to prevent items from sliding off. There are no visible handles or decorative patterns, and the tray appears sturdy enough to support small food items. No brand logo or maker's mark is visible on any surface.
description: A rustic, square wooden serving tray with thick sides and a slatted base, holding two pieces of sushi—one pink and one orange-striped. The tray has a natural, matte finish and no visible handles or decorations.
description_view_0: The tray is seen from a low angle, showing the pink and orange sushi pieces side by side, with the thick wooden sides and corner posts clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the side of the tray with both sushi pieces visible, emphasizing the interlocking wooden joints and the slatted base.
description_view_2: The orange-striped sushi is more prominent in this view, with the tray's raised rim and corner posts framing the food.
description_view_3: The pink sushi is more visible from this angle, and the tray's wooden construction and slatted base are clearly shown.
attribute_rim_design: The rim is slightly raised, approximately 1.5 cm high, formed by thick, flat wooden planks at the tray's edges. The rim is rectangular, with no lips, grooves, or decorative elements.
attribute_reflective_properties: The surface appears matte with minimal reflectivity, showing no significant glare or highlights. All parts of the tray have a consistent, low-sheen finish.
